spec.long_desc: A circular stone fountain stands here, its basin full of clear water.
spec.detailed_desc: A broad stone fountain, its basin carved from a single piece of local granite, sits at the centre of the square. A low continuous trickle of water feeds in from a pipe in the carved centrepiece — a stylised mill wheel — and drains through a grate in the basin floor. The water is clear and cold, and the stone rim is worn smooth from years of people sitting on it.
